description_long: This kiosk consists of a central, compact machine flanked by two tall, rectangular advertising panels. The panels feature vivid food imagery and the 'BLODGETT' logo at the top, with a red and white color scheme. The central unit appears to be a vending or demonstration machine with a digital interface and a small platform or tray at the base. The advertising panels are freestanding, with wide bases for stability and smooth, solid surfaces on the reverse. The overall structure is modular and portable, suitable for temporary installation in urban environments such as sidewalks or plazas. The design is clean and modern, emphasizing brand visibility and product promotion.
description: A modern kiosk with a central vending machine and two tall advertising panels featuring food images and the 'BLODGETT' logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vending machine flanked by two branded advertising panels with food images.
description_view_1: Angled rear view highlighting the plain white backs of the advertising panels and partial logo visibility.
description_view_2: Direct rear view showing the unadorned backs of the panels and the back of the central machine.
description_view_3: Opposite angled rear view, similar to view 1, with plain panel backs and partial logo.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo, placed at the top of both advertising panels, with 'BLODGETT' text and food imagery.
attribute_roof_design: Flat tops on all components, no overhangs or decorative elements, smooth and minimal.
attribute_architectural_style: modern commercial with minimalist branding emphasis
